LOCAL PRINTING TRADES


:. TAKE UP LABOR BATTLE

Will Put Candidates On Record Rel


alive to Asiatic Exclusion

pages.raw_text:
In the absence of a Japanese
Korean league in Spokane, the AL.
lied Printing Trades council has
taken up the matter of excluding
cheap oriental labor from the Pa
cific coast.


The council has sent letters tC
Senator Levi Ankeny and Represen
tative Jones, both Of whom are
candidates for the senate, asking
them how they stand on the exclu
sion Of Asiatic laborers.


Councilman N. J. Laumer Is
president Of the local printing
tSsdes council, and Gustave Anger
secretary.


The question the council pro
poses to put up to every candidate
seeking election to congress from
this district follows: q


1.-THE white laborer in the state OF
Washington is suffering from the
Entertainments of cheap oriental la
Dor. This menace can only be
eliminated by more stringent ex
clusion laws. AS a candidate seek
ing the support Of the people OF
this state your views on this ques
ton are particularly pertinent.


IF elected to the position which
you seek will you use your in
fiuence and vote for measures look.
